chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1405 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 Mr. Fayaz Ali Shahani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The respondents No.2, 4 and 5 have filed their statements, which are taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. The perusal of statements reflects that case has been challaned and purpose for filing instant constitutional petition become infructuous therefore same is hereby disposed of being infructuous. The petitioner is set at liberty to approach before proper forum for proper remedy/ relief. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
